Mini game — Google Snake inspired

Play Snake.

Smooth, gliding movement, four rotating fruits, and a rare golden bonus that's only on the board for a few seconds. Guide your snake without biting yourself or the walls, pick a difficulty, and chase a high score.

Snake,
uncaged.

Use arrow keys or WASD — or tap the D-pad or swipe on mobile. Watch for the golden fruit — it only sticks around a few seconds. Pick a difficulty above, then hit Play.

0
Score
0
Best
3
Length
Difficulty
How to play
  • Arrow keys or WASD to steer
  • Tap the D-pad or swipe on the board on mobile
  • Grab the golden fruit fast — it's timed
  • Don't bite yourself or the walls
Competition

🏆 Global Leaderboard

Glossary

  • Venomous: Injects venom through fangs.
  • Constriction: Killing prey by coiling.
  • Elapid: Fixed front-fanged snakes.
  • Viper: Hinged long-fanged venomous snake.
